mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coupon ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM coupon WHERE restaurant_id = #{restaurantId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon (restaurant_id, title, discount_amount, min_spend, total_quantity, remaining_quantity, valid_until, status) VALUES (#{restaurantId}, #{title}, #{discountAmount}, #{minSpend}, #{totalQuantity}, #{remainingQuantity}, #{validUntil}, #{status})
